draft_reply.body:
Hi Shelley,

Thanks for your patience. Here are our updated rates for the package you asked about.

original_email.body:
Hi Shelley,

Thanks for reaching out. Yes, I’m open to reviewing a potential paid
sponsorship around an agent app.

I’m looping in Sam Levin, my business partner, and Asher Weisberger,
my Client Services Manager. They help coordinate my sponsorships,
scheduling, and campaign details, and they’ll take it from here.

Asher/Sam, Shelley is from Arco and reached out about a paid
sponsorship to introduce an agent app. Please help guide the
conversation and gather the details.

Thank you,

Robert Scoble
Founder, Unaligned (media company about how AI is bringing us new things)
Mobile: +1-425-205-1921
X: https://x.com/scobleizer
Web: https://unaligned.io
This message copyright the sender. All rights reserved.

email_thread.body:
Sorry but we are at a hard stance with our pricing.

Those rates are NON NEGOTIABLE 

We offer discounts on due tier programs and Multi tier (ATTACHED)

Roberts value increases everyday he posts, and his viewers know this.

The Unaligned weekly newsletter has over 5,000 subscribers with an open rate of 50%.

Let me know how you would like to move foward, 

Best,
Asher
